ocr.text: In the rapidly evolving landscape of financial technology, the intersection of Insurtech and cryptocurrency has garnered
significant attention from investors and regulators alike. The accompanying data table provides a comprehensive overview of
key metrics related to Insurtech policy issuance and regulatory compliance costs in North America.
PolicyType  TotalIssued  AveragePremium  Year-over-YearGrowth  MarketShare  ClaimsRatio  CustomerSatisfaction
LifeInsurance  $25M  $500  15%  25%  85%  90%  NorthAmerica
HealthInsurance  $30M  $400  10%  20%  90%  88%  NorthAmerica
AutoInsurance  $20M  $300  5%  18%  92%  89%  NorthAmerica
HomeInsurance  $15M  $250  12%  22%  87%  91%  NorthAmerica
TotalPolicies  $90M  $400  10%  20%  88%  90%  NorthAmerica
Notably, the figures highlight that personnel expenses related to compliance have reached CAD $10 million, underscoring the
financial commitment required to navigate the complex regulatory environment.
RegulatoryComplianceCosts  Q32023
CostType  TotalCosts
DirectCosts  $25M  IndirectCosts
PersonnelExpenses  $10M  SoftwareLicenses  $7M  ConsultingFees
AuditCosts  $5M  TrainingExpenses  $3M  ComplianceFines
TotalPersonnel  200  ComplianceOfficers  50  ExternalConsultants
Additionally, the allocation of CAD $7 million for software licenses illustrates the investment in technology necessary to
enhance operational efficiency and ensure adherence to regulatory standards.
CryptocurrencyTradingMetrics  Volume(CAD)  MarketShareIndicators  GrowthRatios  AveragePrice
Bitcoin  Ethereum  Ripple  Litecoin  Cardano  TotalVolume  MarketCap  P/ERatio  CurrentRatio  Debt/Equity  LiquidityRatio
As cryptocurrency trading volumes continue to rise, particularly with assets like Bitcoin and Ethereum, industry stakeholders
must remain vigilant in managing the associated risks. The data reflects a critical juncture for Insurtech companies, balancing
innovative offerings against the backdrop of stringent regulatory requirements, which currently stands at a compliance cost of
15% of total operational expenditures. Understanding these dynamics is essential for stakeholders aiming to optimize their
strategic positioning in this competitive market.
